recommendations.title: City Hunter
recommendations.overview: Nicky Larson is tasked to recover the perfume of Cupid, a perfume that would make anyone who uses it irresistible.

recommendations.title: Full Speed
recommendations.overview: A family together with their grandpa go on a vacation, when their new car won't stop and it nearly escapes crashing into a hundred cars.

recommendations.title: Superwho?
recommendations.overview: A struggling actor seems doomed to live life as a loser. When he finally snatches a lead role as a superhero named “Badman,” he feels like everything is possible, but fate strikes again.

recommendations.title: Do You Do You Saint-Tropez

recommendations.title: 3 Days Max
recommendations.overview: Clumsy policeman Rayane has three days to rescue his kidnapped grandmother from a Mexican cartel.
